messages.content: yo magic celtics next saturday u down??
🔥🔥 get me one ill venmo u
yo eric u finishing the volunteer sheet? linda keeps asking lol
garden meeting thursday u gonna be there??
nice we need to figure out the raised beds
linda said theres new shovels too lol
bro this game is gonna be insane 🔥🔥
yeah saturday night. u getting tickets??
yo garden meeting tonight at 530. u coming right
bro just show up for 20 min 💪
linda needs the materials list and ur the only one who has it
cmon bro its not that bad. in and out
might be stuck at the clinic late
one of my patients had a setback. extra paperwork
ah man. next time for sure tho
ill tell linda u had a work thing
going to the magic game tmrw
ah cant im at my moms. have fun tho
dude hawks game saturday. u thinking about it??
yeah def last home game basically
yo playoffs start next week. magic hawks game 1 is thursday. u want in?
section 110 seats are 120 each. same spot as the pacers game
jaylen's game is at 8 tomorrow right
can you take him? i have maya's dance class in the morning
his cleats are in the garage dont forget
hey trevor had an extra ticket for the magic game tonight
sounds good. ill be back by 10
hey can you pick jaylen up from the tournament today
should be done around 3. hes at sylvan lake park
are you guys on the way back
yeah just left. ran a little late
jaylen scored the third one lol
tell him i said great job
he wont stop talking about it
grab milk on the way home?
work appreciation thing tonight, free tickets
magic game. denise got them through a patient or something
oh nice. what time will you be home
babe did you see the duke energy bill
sorry i know youre at the game
ive been looking at the numbers and im stressed
everything. the car the loans jaylens soccer
it feels like its all going out and nothing is coming in
babe its fine. ive been on top of it
how much do we have in savings
we're at about four grand babe, we're okay
ok thats better than i thought honestly 😬
jaylen has his tournament tmrw at 9
ok maya wants to go to michaels so ill do that while ur gone
hey dropping the car off at tesla this morning
are they giving you a ride or do you need a pickup
they do an inspection too and they were booked up
ill be done at work by then. ill figure out a ride
ok i can pick you up if you need
cars done. heading to pick it up
yeah all good. just the rotation and they did an inspection
yeah. they said cabin filter needs replacing eventually but no rush
pick up milk on the way back?
you get it every time lol
the kids want to know if theres cake
yeah i grabbed one from publix. its in the garage fridge
jaylen wants to go to the park can you take them so i can sleep in a little
yeah both mortgage and soccer went through
heading to publix you need anything
milk and the frozen waffles jaylen likes
can you grab maya from rehearsal today i got stuck at work
hey did you check on the savings this month
fine like how much is in there
i moved 200 over the other day
its around where it always is. were good
i just put money in like 2 days ago. what do you want me to say
i dont want to fight about it
i just want to see the numbers babe thats all
ok yeah this weekend we can look at it
so rob texted about doing another game night
do we really need to host again this soon
i know but babe the snacks last time was like 60 bucks
thats almost a hundred dollars for one night
its just the neighbors hanging out. ill keep it cheap this time
chips and salsa not a whole spread 😬
ok fine. it was fun last time i just...
im watching the money you know
i know babe. itll be chill
coach just sent the bracket for tmrw
yeah picking up his kid on the way
ok what time are you leaving
probably like 7. first game is at 830
trevor wants to go to the magic game tonight
haha yeah its bucks should be a good one
trevor is covering most of it. like 40 bucks for my ticket
ok... just feels like theres a game every week lately
its not that many babe. i can check the calendar
just ordered some yard stuff from home depot
mulch, soil, and some flowers. gonna do the beds tomorrow
thats not bad. the front really needs it
heading to home depot to pick up the order
grab me a coffee on the way back?
supertunias are gonna pop in a couple weeks. did both beds
biscuit better stay out of it lol ❤️
did you pay jaylen's tournament fee
i feel like money just disappears
its a lot of little things adding up
do we have enough in savings in case something happens
yes babe savings is still around four thousand. we're fine
sorry i just get in my head about it
hey btw meeting with omar next thursday
nah ill handle it. just the usual check in
hey trevor got tickets for next saturday. hawks game
he said dont worry about it
should i make the pasta salad again
ok running to publix real quick
do we have enough paper plates
ill grab some and ice on the way back
get the good ones not the flimsy ones
what time is rob getting here to set up
hey did you get a chance to pull up the account stuff for the refinance
not yet been swamped at work
babe the deadline is friday. can you just screenshot everything tonight? checking savings credit card all of it. or just forward me omars summary if thats easier
hey so vanessas birthday is this weekend
taking her to bonefish grill sunday night
yeah she always gets the bang bang shrimp lol
already got concert tickets. john legend at dr phillips saturday night
haha yeah i hope she likes it
tell her happy bday from me and mike ❤️
so the kids keep asking about fishing. you free june?
maybe yeah let me look at the calendar
they wont stop talking about it 🐟
kid friendly fishing spots near orlando
u look at teh calendar yet
been crazy at work ill figure it out this week
this kid caught a huge one lol
hey been meaning to text u back about the fishing thing
the kids are gonna lose it 🐟🐟
june could work but i gotta see whats going on
just dont ghost me again lol
hey yall. board game night at our place dec 13? like 6pm
we got settlers and ticket to ride. thinking about picking up wingspan too
wingspan is so good!! my sister has it
we have plenty of snacks leftover from thanksgiving too
ill grab some more stuff and maybe some beer
last night was so fun!! thanks for hosting
yeah that was great. wingspan is addicting
glad yall had fun. we should do it again
game night round 2! feb 21 at 6. whos in
just drinks. keeping it low key
pete u still owe me a rematch at settlers lol
so fun! pete you actually won this time 😂
hey is anybody thinking about a spring cookout this year
yeah lets do it. what weekend
cool ill do burgers and dogs on the grill
ooh ill make my potato salad and bring a fruit tray
ill bring the cooler and drinks
look at this. fishing charter out of port canaveral
we should totally do this for summer
just seeing this! that sounds so fun
how many of us would it be
like 6? or 8 if we bring all the kids
jaylen and maya would love it
but $350 a person... that adds up fast 😬
they might have kid pricing idk
babe can you look into it
ok let us know what you find ❤️
not yet been slammed at work
any update on the fishing charter prices?
hey man long time. u still in orlando?
yeah man still here. hows atlanta
good good. we should link up sometime
yeah we should. coming down anytime?
thinking march for spring training maybe
send me the dates when u know
happy new year. how was the trip
all good. holler if ur looking
march 14-15 for the trip works. atl area
ill see if i can swing a sat drive up
hey eric! saw lakeview is hiring another PT. you guys busy?
yeah pretty packed lately. how are things at advent health
hey you still have that hedge trimmer
yeah its in the garage. need it?
Reminder: break room fridge clean-out is Friday. Please label your items.
my lunch is the one in the red bag dont throw it out lol
is the coffee machine fixed yet
Quick reminder: monthly compliance modules due by 1/31. Do them this week.
ill knock them out at lunch tmrw
the documentation one is the longest fyi
Heads up: I'll be out Friday afternoon. Page me only if it's a true emergency.
anyone want to swap a 4pm? i can take morning if so
i can take ur 4 if u take my 8am thurs
front desk just said the airtable is glitching again
Calling Airtable support now. Use paper schedule until I confirm.
morning ride sat 7am? lake nona loop
yep ill toss one in my bag
rain looking iffy sun. ride or no?
strava summary said i hit 600mi this year already lol
metric century in may anyone in?
kissimmee tournament jan 11, anyone want to carpool?
we can take 2 extra if needed
we will take you up on that. mia and parker
tony coach said wear white kits
presidents day tournament moved to field 5
fields were rough last week. extra socks for sat
anyone have a portable phone charger jaylens died at the field
end of season pizza party at coach riveras 4/26
spring planting schedule is up on the shared doc
nice. im doing tomatoes this year
i got some in my garage. ill bring em thurs
soil delivery confirmed thursday 9am. need 2 ppl to help unload
spring volunteer signup is full btw, nice
block party committee still needs help
eric want to take the chair role for april? you've been steady
appreciate it but maybe vice. dont have bandwidth for chair
vice works. ill update the airtable
shed lock combo changed, new one is in the shared doc
tomato seedlings in the ground! pic when im home
Reminder: Eric Harris, you have an appointment with Dr. Patel on 01/09/2026 at 10:30 AM. Reply C to confirm or R to reschedule.
Hi Eric! Your cleaning with Dr. Foster is scheduled for 03/20 at 2:00 PM. Reply YES to confirm.
Your Amazon order has been delivered. Left at front door.
internet has been cutting out all morning
Thanks for reaching out. We're seeing an outage in your area. Estimated restoration: 2:00 PM EST.
T-Mobile: Your autopay of $125.00 has been processed for your account ending in 0276. Thank you.
Your Tesla service appointment is confirmed for 11/12 at 9:00 AM at Tesla Service Orlando.
Publix: Your digital coupons are expiring soon! Open the Publix app to save on your favorites this week.
Foxtail Coffee: Earn double stars this weekend! Visit any location Fri-Sun. Show this text at checkout.
ACTION NEEDED: Your voter registration in Orange County needs updating before the Aug primary. Visit vote.org to verify your info.
URGENT: Your vehicle warranty is about to expire. Call 1-888-555-0199 to extend coverage before its too late.
Hi Eric. Jaylen did great at practice today. Hes been working hard on his left foot. Just wanted you to know.
Also can you sign the permission slip for the Daytona tournament? Need it by Friday.
hey man havent seen you at the rides in a while
Eric do you still have the volunteer contact spreadsheet? I cant find it on the drive.
No rush just let me know when you get a chance
